Name: Tithes & Offerings
Description: Regular weekly tithes and general offerings received from congregation members

Name: Building Fund Contributions
Description: Designated contributions toward the church building fund and capital improvements

Name: Special Offerings
Description: Easter, Christmas, Revival, and other designated special occasion offerings

Name: Plate Offerings
Description: Sunday and midweek service collection plate offerings not designated elsewhere

Name: Rental Income – Fellowship Hall
Description: Income from renting the fellowship hall for community events, receptions, and meetings

Name: VFW Cookout Proceeds
Description: Proceeds from annual VFW Cookout fundraiser held on church grounds

Name: Bake Sale Proceeds
Description: Proceeds from church bake sales and food fundraising events

Name: Accounts Receivable
Description: Amounts owed to the church for hall rentals and other receivables not yet collected

Name: Operating Checking – BB&T
Description: Primary operating checking account at BB&T for day-to-day church expenses

Name: Building Fund Savings – Regions
Description: Dedicated savings account at Regions Bank for building fund and capital project reserves

Name: Accounts Payable
Description: Amounts owed to vendors and service providers for goods and services received

Name: Mortgage – Sanctuary
Description: Outstanding mortgage balance on the church sanctuary building held with Regions Bank

Name: Utilities
Description: Electric, gas, and water utility expenses for church facilities

Name: Custodial Supplies
Description: Cleaning products, paper goods, and janitorial supplies for church facilities

Name: Pastoral Stipend
Description: Monthly housing and ministry stipend paid to Pastor Wilkins

Name: Office & Admin
Description: Office supplies, postage, phone, internet, and general administrative expenses

Name: Building Maintenance & Repairs
Description: HVAC, plumbing, electrical, roofing, and general building repair and maintenance costs

Name: Insurance – Church Property
Description: Annual property, liability, and casualty insurance premiums for church facilities

Name: Sound System & A/V
Description: Sound system maintenance, microphones, projectors, screens, and A/V equipment costs

Name: Landscaping & Grounds
Description: Lawn care, landscaping, tree trimming, and grounds maintenance services

Name: Printing & Bulletins
Description: Weekly bulletins, event programs, newsletters, and other printed church materials

Name: Mission & Outreach
Description: Donations to missions, community outreach programs, food pantry, and charitable giving

Name: Retained Earnings
Description: Cumulative net surplus carried forward from prior fiscal years
